overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a character exploring a sci-fi desert outpost at sunset. The character walks along a metal platform under a massive rock overhang, passing futuristic industrial structures and approaching a cliff edge overlooking a misty expanse.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi outpost landing platform under rock overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the platform toward distant structures

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a structure in the distance

entered.detail: large curved rock formation forming a ceiling overhead
tall round structure with illuminated windows and metallic finish
large pinkish celestial body dominating the sky
rocky peaks silhouetted against the sunset sky
futuristic industrial structures in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide metal platform beneath a massive rock overhang. A cylindrical tower stands to the right while two distant figures linger near buildings on the left. The pink planet hangs large in the dusky sky above the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved platform path with dome storage structures

events.description: passing the cylindrical tower, view opens toward rounded dome structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path, moving away from the initial structures toward the domes

entered.detail: rounded metallic buildings with greenish patina and industrial detailing
metal rails embedded in the platform floor

segments.scene_description: The path curves gently right, passing the cylindrical tower and revealing dome-shaped structures on the right. The platform continues under the rock overhang with metal rail tracks visible on the ground. The pink planet shifts toward the right side of the frame as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlook with safety railing and misty view

events.description: reaching the platform edge revealing the vast misty expanse below

agents.ego_description: approaching the railing and looking out over the edge at the cloud layer below

entered.detail: metal barrier with glowing blue lights marking the platform edge
dense fog and clouds covering the lower landscape beneath the platform
short illuminated bollard on the platform surface

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the platform where a safety railing with blue lights marks the boundary. Beyond the railing, a vast sea of mist and clouds stretches out to the distant mountains. The character walks along the overlook, taking in the dramatic view under the rock overhang.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an industrial metal platform that transitions from a sheltered corridor into a dramatic cliffside overlook. It begins beneath a massive rock overhang, passing a cylindrical tower and distant figures while a large pink planet looms over far-off mountains in the dusky sky. As the path curves gently to the right, the camera glides past dome-shaped structures and metal rail tracks, causing the pink planet to shift across the frame. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the platform's edge, where a safety railing illuminated by blue lights marks the boundary. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a vast sea of mist and clouds stretching toward the distant mountains under the protective shadow of the rock overhang.
